note: BRAIN layer — Day 52 (Monday 2026-05-18, Batch 5 Day 6). new_replies.json unchanged from 2026-04-04 (44 days). Zero Batch 5 replies confirmed to date. IMAP gap: 44 days from last confirmed check. Reply peak 72h post-bump — at closing boundary. IMAP sweep mandatory TODAY before each LinkedIn note. IMAP sweep mandatory TOMORROW before each Day-7 send. No new classifications this run.
monday_sweep_status: NOT YET EXECUTED — new_replies.json unchanged. Execute per Batch 5 lead this morning (before LinkedIn notes).
reply_peak_post_day3_bump: CLOSING — 72h post-bump boundary. Monday morning IMAP sweep will confirm state of inbox.

imap_mandatory_today.execute: Per Batch 5 lead — before each LinkedIn connection note send. NOT leads 1/3/22.
imap_mandatory_today.priority: First action of the day — before LinkedIn

outcomes_and_actions.if_interested: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Still proceed with LinkedIn note (do NOT reference email). Prepare proposal within 24h. Cancel Day-7 send — use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section). Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_not_interested: Classify here as NOT_INTERESTED. Block LinkedIn permanently. Cancel Day-7 send. Suppress email channel permanently. Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_unsubscribe: Classify here as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Cancel Day-7 send.
outcomes_and_actions.if_ooo: Classify here as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. LinkedIn still valid — connection request is passive. Proceed with LinkedIn note. Day-7: send day after stated OOO return if within 14-day window.
outcomes_and_actions.if_wrong_person: Classify here as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.
outcomes_and_actions.if_clean: LinkedIn approved. Proceed with connection request. Log CHANGELOG.

imap_mandatory_tomorrow.execute: Before each individual Day-7 send — per lead, not bulk.
imap_mandatory_tomorrow.priority: All Batch 5 Ryedale leads, in send order (09:00-10:30 window)
imap_mandatory_tomorrow.what_to_write_if_new_reply: Write immediately to data/new_replies.json. Classify in this file. Update value_delivery_queue.json if INTERESTED. Log CHANGELOG same session.
imap_mandatory_tomorrow.day7_batch_classification_context: Day-7 new-angle sends (tomorrow) will generate a fresh reply wave 24-72h post-send (Wednesday-Friday). Classify any new replies from that wave in this file as they arrive.

if_interested.action: Write reply to new_replies.json immediately. Classify here as INTERESTED with full reasoning. Cancel Day-7 send — use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json (conditional_handling section). Reply in thread to their message. Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h (from reply time — NON-NEGOTIABLE). Activate LinkedIn within Day 7 hard deadline (2026-05-19). Update CRM stage to 'proposal_sent' after proposal sent. Add entry to value_delivery_queue.json batch_5_interested_leads.
if_interested.24h_sla: NON-NEGOTIABLE. Tom (Ripon Road Carpentry) asked for pricing and never received it. That does not repeat.
if_interested.linkedin_deadline: Day 7 = Tuesday 2026-05-19 EOD. Archive trigger fires immediately if missed.

if_not_interested.action: Classify as NOT_INTERESTED. Suppress email channel permanently. Block LinkedIn permanently. Log CHANGELOG. Update lead status to 'lost'.

if_ooo.action: Classify as OUT_OF_OFFICE. Note return date. Pause Day-7 send. LinkedIn still valid (passive request). Send Day-7 on day after stated return if within 14-day window (i.e. return date must be before 2026-05-25).
if_ooo.linkedin_note: Connection request is passive — OK to send during OOO period. Do not follow up with value message until OOO period ends.

if_wrong_person.action: Classify as WRONG_PERSON. Pause sequence. Investigate correct contact via website/Companies House. Log CHANGELOG.

if_unsubscribe.action: Classify as UNSUBSCRIBE. Suppress ALL channels permanently within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG. Block LinkedIn. Cancel Day-7 and Day-14 sends.

summary.hands_instructions: 1. IMAP sweep per Batch 5 lead TODAY (Monday) before LinkedIn — per lead, not bulk. Write any new reply to new_replies.json immediately. 2. If INTERESTED: classify here, 24h proposal SLA from reply time, still send LinkedIn note (do not reference email), cancel Day-7 (use interested variant). 3. If NOT_INTERESTED: classify, cancel Day-7, block all channels. 4. If UNSUBSCRIBE: classify, suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21), cancel Day-7 and Day-14. 5. TOMORROW Tuesday: IMAP per lead before each Day-7 send. 6. Do NOT sweep leads 1/3/22 under any circumstances.
